title: 6-7 brainrot totem of undying
description: This resource pack changes the texture of the totem of undying to a 6-7 one.
body:
# 6-7 Brainrot Totem of Undying
Upgrade your Minecraft survival with pure chaos! This resource pack transforms the classic Totem of Undying into the 6-7 Brainrot Totem of Undying — a wild, meme-inspired design bursting with neon colors, glitch effects, and absurd energy.

### Why download it?

- Perfect for Meme Enthusiasts: Add humor and unpredictability to your hardcore runs.
- Lightweight & Compatible: Works seamlessly with other resource packs and shaders.

Survive in style, because even immortality deserves a little brainrot!

## Terms of Use

You are free to use this resource pack in Minecraft, your videos, and your modpacks.

If you include it in a modpack or showcase it in a video, please add a link to this page in the description.

_**Do not redistribute or claim the pack as your own.**_
